job_spine.description: Small-business job lifecycle for Treasure Valley-style ops. Fetch chain in order; attach extensions by anchor.

extension_index.fetch_when: Rush fee and hard proof windows
Courtesy credit, not full refund fight
Hard event or trade show date

entries.title: LLM API Bootcamp
entries.not_for: Job spine comms packs or rubrics — use templates/tools after bootcamp if needed.
trigger_phrases: How do I call an LLM API?
Need LLM API bootcamp pack

entries.title: Should I Automate This?
entries.description: Deterministic rubric: should this task stay manual, use a template, gather data, or automate? Built for ops-heavy small business.
entries.use_when: Operator asks whether to buy software, automate a task, or keep a manual habit.
entries.not_for: Routing a specific email draft (mf-tool-002) or saying no to scope creep (mf-tool-003).
trigger_phrases: Operator asks whether to buy software, automate a task, or keep a manual habit.
Need playbook: Should I Automate This?

entries.title: AI Task Fit
entries.description: Route tasks to AI draft, human-only, or template path. Pairs with job spine comms packs.
entries.use_when: Deciding if AI should draft, classify, or stay out of a task entirely.
entries.not_for: Buy/build automation decision (mf-tool-001) or CO boundary (mf-tool-003).
trigger_phrases: Deciding if AI should draft, classify, or stay out of a task entirely.
Need playbook: AI Task Fit

entries.title: Scope Creep / Say-No
entries.description: Say-no and CO routing rubric for scope creep. Cross-links mf-tpl-012 and quote gate.
entries.use_when: Client asks for free extra scope, rush without fee, or work outside signed quote.
entries.not_for: Automation fit (mf-tool-001) or AI draft routing (mf-tool-002).
trigger_phrases: Client asks for free extra scope, rush without fee, or work outside signed quote.
Need playbook: Scope Creep / Say-No

entries.title: Customer Complaint Recovery
entries.description: Complaint recovery spine route: severity branches, templates, log rows. Use before treating anger as new intake.
entries.use_when: Existing customer is angry, threatening reviews, or reporting a failure on delivered work.
entries.not_for: New lead intake (mf-tpl-004) or light warranty FAQ (mf-tpl-020).
trigger_phrases: Existing customer is angry, threatening reviews, or reporting a failure on delivered work.
Need playbook: Customer Complaint Recovery Playbook

entries.title: Rapid Employee Onboarding
entries.description: Rapid onboarding by role: templates, buddy, Day 7/30 checkpoints. HR adjacent to job spine.
entries.use_when: New hire Day 0 through Day 30 for floor, driver, or office role.
entries.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: New hire Day 0 through Day 30 for floor, driver, or office role.
Need playbook: Rapid Employee Onboarding Kit

entries.title: Hiring Character Gauge
entries.description: Three-question character gauge with scored examples. Routes hires to mf-tpl-002 onboarding.
entries.use_when: Interview finishers and hire/pass decision on character, not just skills.
entries.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Interview finishers and hire/pass decision on character, not just skills.
Need playbook: Hiring Character Gauge

entries.title: Client Intake Playbook
entries.description: Job spine entry: classify intake, first touch within SLA, qualify before mf-tpl-006 quote.
entries.use_when: First contact from unknown lead: form, email, DM, or call. Not complaint recovery.
entries.not_for: Angry existing customer (mf-tpl-001) or sending a quote (mf-tpl-006).
trigger_phrases: First contact from unknown lead: form, email, DM, or call. Not complaint recovery.
Need playbook: Client Intake Playbook

entries.title: Weekly 15-Min Ops Review
entries.description: 15-minute ops overlay for spine. Five blocks, variants, cross-links payment and queue packs.
entries.use_when: Weekly owner or lead ops ritual: money, queue, people, one improvement.
entries.not_for: Single client thread — use spine packs for one job.
trigger_phrases: Weekly owner or lead ops ritual: money, queue, people, one improvement.
Need playbook: Weekly 15-Min Ops Review

entries.title: Quote / Estimate Gate
entries.description: Quote gate: branches for rush, repeat, partial scope. Chains from mf-tpl-004 intake.
entries.use_when: Scope is clear enough to price: custom quote or estimate gate before send.
entries.not_for: Following up silent quote (mf-tpl-014) or revising sent quote (mf-tpl-028).
trigger_phrases: Scope is clear enough to price: custom quote or estimate gate before send.
Need playbook: Quote / Estimate Gate

entries.title: Delivery + Handoff
entries.description: Delivery and handoff templates with unpaid hold and issue branches. Precedes mf-tpl-015 close.
entries.use_when: Job ready to leave shop: notify, handoff, confirm receipt, unpaid hold.
entries.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Job ready to leave shop: notify, handoff, confirm receipt, unpaid hold.
Need playbook: Delivery + Handoff

entries.title: Invoice + Payment Chase
entries.description: Invoice and payment chase sequence. Pairs mf-tpl-005 money block and mf-tpl-029 plans.
entries.use_when: Invoice sent: chase calendar day 3, 7, 14 and partial payment states.
entries.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Invoice sent: chase calendar day 3, 7, 14 and partial payment states.
Need playbook: Invoice + Payment Chase

entries.title: Vendor Issue Playbook
entries.description: Vendor issue playbook with client delay scripts. Mid-spine between production and delivery.
entries.use_when: Vendor late, wrong, short, or damaged: internal chase plus honest client plan.
entries.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Vendor late, wrong, short, or damaged: internal chase plus honest client plan.
Need playbook: Vendor Issue Playbook

entries.title: Project Kickoff Checklist
entries.description: Post-accept kickoff checklist. Bridges quote win to proof and production handoffs.
entries.use_when: Quote accepted: deposit, schedule, proof path, kickoff email.
entries.not_for: Pre-accept quote work (mf-tpl-006) or proof round (mf-tpl-011).
trigger_phrases: Quote accepted: deposit, schedule, proof path, kickoff email.
Need playbook: Project Kickoff Checklist

entries.title: Proof + Client Approval Gate
entries.description: Proof approval gate with written approval rule. Release trigger for floor and mf-tpl-017.
entries.use_when: Proof round sent: require written APPROVED before production release.
entries.not_for: Design loop before proof (mf-tpl-042) or physical sample (mf-tpl-043).
trigger_phrases: Proof round sent: require written APPROVED before production release.
Need playbook: Proof + Client Approval Gate

entries.title: Change Order Mid-Job
entries.description: Change order mid-job scripts. Works with mf-tool-003 and mf-tpl-013 updates.
entries.use_when: Scope grows after quote: freeze, document, CO, client accept.
entries.not_for: Initial quote only — use when scope grows after accept.
trigger_phrases: Scope grows after quote: freeze, document, CO, client accept.
Need playbook: Change Order Mid-Job

entries.title: Client Status Update
entries.description: Client status update templates. Spine glue during active jobs.
entries.use_when: Proactive where-we-are update: on track, slip, waiting on client, waiting on vendor.
entries.not_for: Complaint recovery (mf-tpl-001) — status updates assume active job in good faith.
trigger_phrases: Proactive where-we-are update: on track, slip, waiting on client, waiting on vendor.
Need playbook: Client Status Update

entries.title: Quote Follow-Up
entries.description: Quote follow-up sequence between mf-tpl-006 send and mf-tpl-010 accept.
entries.use_when: Quote sent, no reply: nudge, expire, requote, win/loss.
entries.not_for: First quote build (mf-tpl-006) or post-accept kickoff (mf-tpl-010).
trigger_phrases: Quote sent, no reply: nudge, expire, requote, win/loss.
Need playbook: Quote Follow-Up

entries.title: Job Close + Archive
entries.description: Job close and archive checklist. Spine terminal node before growth extensions.
entries.use_when: Paid and delivered: archive, internal close, optional review ask.
entries.not_for: Generic ops — fetch only when use_when matches; do not replace spine chain packs.
trigger_phrases: Paid and delivered: archive, internal close, optional review ask.
Need playbook: Job Close + Archive

entries.description: Deposit missing after accept. Extension on mf-tpl-010. Deterministic branches and templates.

entries.title: Support Unit Economics Playbook
